entry.name: serverHost
entry.label: Hostname or IP of the Whisper NPU server

entry.name: serverPort
entry.label: Port number of the Whisper NPU server

entry.name: device
entry.label: OpenVINO inference device: NPU, CPU, or GPU

entry.name: backend
entry.label: Backend engine: openvino or whisper-cpp

entry.name: hotkey
entry.label: Push-to-talk hotkey (evdev key name)

entry.name: streamInterval
entry.label: Seconds between streaming transcription updates

entry.name: hfOrg
entry.label: HuggingFace organization to search for models

entry.name: languageBuddyEnabled
entry.label: Enable Language Buddy overlay

entry.name: languageBuddyBypass
entry.label: Type original text immediately, show overlay for alternatives

entry.name: languageBuddyTimeout
entry.label: Overlay auto-dismiss timeout in seconds

entry.name: language
entry.label: ISO language code for transcription (empty for auto-detect)

entry.name: voiceCommandsEnabled
entry.label: Enable voice command detection

entry.name: notificationsEnabled
entry.label: Show desktop notifications after transcription

entry.name: vadThreshold
entry.label: Voice activity detection silence threshold in dB

entry.name: recallKey
entry.label: History recall hotkey (evdev key name)

entry.name: autoPunctuate
entry.label: Post-process transcriptions through LLM for punctuation

entry.name: translateTo
entry.label: Target language for LLM translation (empty to disable)

entry.name: audioFeedbackEnabled
entry.label: Play sounds on recording events

entry.name: dictationFormattingEnabled
entry.label: Auto-format numbers, abbreviations, emails, URLs

entry.name: muteOtherStreams
entry.label: Mute other recording streams while push-to-talk is recording
